caption: 电商预填费用

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT chyjhsheet.kpgc
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   ((chyjh.SID=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.fphm=[电商预填费用.发票号码])
   and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)) group by chyjhsheet.kpgc

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="市场采购代理模式专业产品") and (bz=:bz)

SELECT gcgm.gcgm,gcgm.SID
FROM gcgm
ORDER BY gcgm.SID ASC

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率") order by zx.cs desc

SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%单证电商%")

SELECT  wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.SID,cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="预填审批")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT gchk.wfyhmc
FROM gchk
 group by gchk.wfyhmc

SELECT chyjhsheet.SID,chyjhsheet.cght
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   (chyjh.SID=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.wxfp=:wxfp)
   AND  (chyjhsheet.sccj1 like "%"+ :sccj1  +"%") and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.SID ASC

name: 电商预填费用
title_field: 电商预填费用.预填单号
